[Pick Up Recruitment Preview]

Rerun Pick Up Recruitments will begin on 9/27 (Tue)!
Target Pick Up Student: 3★ Koharu, 3★ Haruna

Pick Up Recruitment Period: 9/27 (Tue) 02:00 – 10/4 (Tue) 02:00 (UTC) Before Maintenance![iOy6puWu5tdVQSzswPiinZ5V9NPn7UAg.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/iOy6puWu5tdVQSzswPiinZ5V9NPn7UAg.jpg)![xgln04vTzsLIFQEKYVYIXXRTPvgaC7Gi.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/xgln04vTzsLIFQEKYVYIXXRTPvgaC7Gi.jpg)
